meta.banner: PAPER / RESEARCH — no staking. Verdict metrics are pre-registered; everything here is observational.
omissions: Scout/v3/Sim-1 render only from same-slate local artifacts; no new API calls are made by the dashboard generator.

sim_picks.frame: Sim-1 passive/unscored shadow archive; display uses rank and uncalibrated sim score only. v0-lite score magnitudes are known to be roughly 3x inflated and must not be read as probabilities.
